TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kedrick_Brown, title = Kedrick_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kedrick_Brown} }

S.FORM: Kedrick Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1981, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 3, Kedrick Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Kedrick Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1981, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 3, Kedrick Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ke*riʦ~ʨk βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ke*riʦ~ʨk βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
